signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Sparking Inflation and Independence Debates Amid Market Volatility** | **
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Sparking Inflation and Independence Debates Amid Market Volatility** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

President Donald Trump has nominated former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve Chair, a development confirmed in recent reports and triggering global market reactions including a >5% KOSPI drop in South Korea.[2][4][5
matched_markets: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair by May 15?
Will the People Power Party win 2 seats in South Korea’s June 3, 2026 parliament
Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: OKC Thunder Win 2025 NBA Finals in Game 7 Over Pacers 103-91** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]
signals.raw:
OKC Thunder Win 2025 NBA Finals in Game 7 Over Pacers 103-91** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]

The **Oklahoma City Thunder** defeated the Indiana Pacers 103-91 in Game 7 on June 22, 2025, securing their first NBA championship since relocating from Seattle in 2008; Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 29 points[1][3].
